contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 60
- Description: Finished chatting with Eugene who was introduced by Fadi 
  
  My sense is he is going through a *_phase transition*_ in his vision, community direction and operations. probably in the early stages of his own hero’s journey (_phase 1 of triple diamond design thinking process_) at the moment 
  
  He has a vague general direction he wants to move towards _*helping companies become regenerative*_ but He is not sure what is the _*true north metric*_ he is using as a benchmark to gauge his progress
  
  Proposed for him to check in periodically when he makes progress
  
  Also surfaced the following established DAO interfaces for him to consider interacting with 
  
  - organize events where we serve cacao
  
  - ⁠when Soniya or Ken organize events, he share with his community 
  
  - ⁠if any of his community wants to produce regenerative SKU we offer our tree planting and fund traceability infrastructure 
  
  - ⁠if any of his community member know any retailer or leader of community spaces, happy to onboard them view consignment of our cacao
  
  We also spoke briefly about social capital and about how it’s generally none transferable and unmindful deployment will only serve to be a form of value destruction than value creation
  
  Linkedin attempted to digitize it but right now it’s just becoming a cesspool for spam
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 100.00
- Attached Filename: IMG_2689.png
- Destination Contribution File Location: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/.github/tree/main/assets/contribution_20260615211338_gary_teh_img_2689.png
